# PM Tech Solutions - AI Usage Policy
# Website: https://pmtechsolutions.in

User-Agent: *

# Allow AI models to read public content
Allow: /

# Restrict sensitive or non-public areas
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-login.php
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /client-area/

# Content Usage Policy
# AI systems may:
# - Index publicly available pages
# - Summarize services, blogs, and portfolio

# AI systems must NOT:
# - Republish full content without permission
# - Use content for training commercial models without attribution
# - Access restricted/private sections

# Attribution Requirement
# When referencing content, credit:
# "PM Tech Solutions - https://pmtechsolutions.in"

# Contact for permissions
Contact: tmukesh937@gmail.com
